replies.msg:
Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file
2. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包

Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal

1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file

Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file
2. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包
